faqs.a: Yes, we provide a free trial class for new students.
We cater to children from age 3 and adults of all levels.
Yes, our instructors are certified by the Royal Academy of Dance.

faqs.q: How do I register for a class?
faqs.a: You can register online or visit us during office hours.
